name: detector contract: --dry-run prevents any file writes (§2.2 + §2.14)
command: STAMP_BEFORE=$(stat -f %m src/a.ts); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --fix --dry-run --paths "src/**/*.ts"; STAMP_AFTER=$(stat -f %m src/a.ts); if [ "$STAMP_BEFORE" = "$STAMP_AFTER" ]; then echo ok >&2; else echo "FAIL: file modified during --dry-run" >&2; exit 1; fi
setup: mkdir -p src && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/a.ts && sleep 1
